## What changed

Describe the visual or technical change.

## Why

Explain the Chrome state or rendering issue this addresses.

## Verification

- [ ] I ran `npm run release:check`.
- [ ] I loaded `theme/` in the current stable Chrome release.
- [ ] I checked normal and inactive windows.
- [ ] I checked Incognito mode.
- [ ] I tested the relevant display scaling factors.
- [ ] I did not add executable code, permissions, analytics, or network access to `theme/`.
- [ ] I did not add third-party browser names, logos, screenshots, or artwork.

## Screenshots

Include before and after screenshots when the change is visible. Remove personal information first.
